validate_medical_frame_identity_index.py lines 190-197 enforces uniqueness of active activation_key across all frames. Cursor must not introduce a second runtime_authority_status: active frame sharing an activation_key with any existing frame. Pattern from creatinine index: use runtime_authority_status: inactive for frames sharing an activation_key, or promotion_state: deferred/compiled_not_promoted.

changes.check: 2B — STOP condition for Pass_3 frame entries without compiled package dirs
changes.citation: validate_medical_frame_identity_index.py lines 125-129: source_package_path directory existence checked for all frames where promotion_state != deferred. Pass_3 investigation spec IDs (e.g. inv_alt_high_hepatocellular_injury_pattern) are not yet compiled to standalone package directories. Cursor must: (a) set promotion_state: deferred for uncompiled Pass_3 frames, OR (b) set source_package_path to the parent s24/context package that does exist. Failure to handle this will cause validator FAIL on new frames.

advisories.title: Validator source_package_path check will fail for uncompiled Pass_3 frames
advisories.detail: validate_medical_frame_identity_index.py lines 125-129 checks directory existence for all non-deferred frames. Pass_3 investigation specs (inv_alt_high_*, inv_crp_high_*, inv_ferritin_*) are not compiled to standalone package directories. Cursor must set promotion_state: deferred for any frame referencing a non-existent package path, or set source_package_path to an existing package dir (e.g. pkg_s24_alt_high_hepatocellular_injury). This is a hard blocker for validation if mishandled.

advisories.title: supersedes and superseded_by are prompt-required but not schema-required
advisories.detail: knowledge_bus/schema/medical_frame_identity_index_schema_v1.yaml lines 37-53 frame_required_fields does not include supersedes or superseded_by. Validator skips them (validate_medical_frame_identity_index.py lines 95-96). However, prompt lines 212-213 require them. Cursor must include them in every frame entry as null where not applicable — purely authoring discipline, not a validator enforcement.

advisories.title: CF-GOVHELPER-001 is absent from carry-forward register and must be added
advisories.detail: docs/sprints/launch_core_carry_forward_register.md ends at CF-PASS3FRAME-003 (line 59). CF-GOVHELPER-001 does not yet exist. Prompt lines 360-364 require Cursor to add it with the exact text specified in the prompt. Not adding it is a carry-forward register gap that will cause sprint completion criteria failure.

advisories.title: CRP has two distinct signal families in the audit — Cursor must not conflate them
advisories.detail: pass3_frame_coverage_audit_v1.yaml contains two CRP-related entries: signal_crp_high (pkg_s24_crp_high_inflammation, priority 3 in expansion candidates) and signal_systemic_inflammation (pkg_chronic_inflammation, priority 7). These are medically distinct per CF-ARCHLEG1-002 and CF-CHRONICINFL-001. If CRP is selected for indexing, only signal_crp_high should be expanded in this sprint (priority 3). signal_systemic_inflammation is priority 7 and remains a separate open carry-forward.
